variables.notes: R:nc. The best BE concept is the parent-only equity line 'company', which appears in the preview but not in the candidate list. It sits immediately before 'Non-controlling interests' and equals parent equity excluding NCI, so it is preferred over 'Total Equity'. Manual review flagged because selection is outside candidates and the label is generic. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] company
